transcription.text: Despite these obstacles, we've had a strong year, with tobacco revenues surpassing expectations. Our volume was more than 560 billion cigarettes. And overseas market share was no longer as high as it used to be. As we expand into foreign markets, we now control the world.

segments.text: Despite these obstacles, we've had a strong year, with tobacco revenues surpassing expectations.
Our volume was more than 560 billion cigarettes.
And overseas market share was no longer as high as it used to be.
As we expand into foreign markets, we now control the world.
